page: Microsoft Azure D128nlds_v6 is a network-optimized virtual machine belonging to the Dnldv6 server family. It is built on the x86_64 architecture using Intel processors and runs on the Microsoft Hyper-V hypervisor. The server features 128 dedicated vCPUs paired with 256.0 GB of system memory, resulting in a resource density of 2.0 GB of RAM per core.

This server configuration includes 7559 GB of local storage and is premium storage capable. The high capacity of local disk storage combined with network optimization supports workloads requiring rapid data access and high-throughput network interfaces. No complimentary public IPv4 addresses are included with this instance.

The primary architectural tradeoff of the D128nlds_v6 is its low-memory configuration relative to its high core count. With only 2.0 GB of RAM per vCPU, it is not designed for memory-intensive applications. However, this resource distribution offers qualitative cost efficiency for compute-heavy and network-bound workloads that do not require massive memory footprints, as users avoid paying for unutilized RAM.

Due to its 128 dedicated vCPUs, network optimization, and substantial local storage, this server is configured for compute-intensive tasks, network-bound applications, large-scale web serving, and distributed database nodes that benefit from high-speed local disk access.
description: The Microsoft Azure D128nlds_v6 is an x86_64 virtual machine from the Dnldv6 family, running on the Microsoft Hyper-V hypervisor. It features 128 dedicated vCPUs powered by Intel processors and is configured with 256.0 GB of system memory, yielding a low-memory ratio of 2.0 GB per core. This network-optimized instance includes 7559 GB of local disk storage and supports Premium Storage. The primary tradeoff of this configuration is its low memory-to-CPU ratio, which makes it less suitable for memory-bound tasks but highly cost-efficient for compute-heavy and network-bound workloads. This server is designed for workloads such as network-bound applications, compute-intensive processing, and database nodes requiring substantial local storage.
og_description: Microsoft Azure D128nlds_v6 is a network-optimized virtual machine featuring 128 dedicated Intel vCPUs, 256 GB of RAM, and 7559 GB of local storage for compute-heavy and storage-intensive workloads.

tagline: A network-optimized, low-memory virtual machine featuring one hundred twenty-eight dedicated cores and seven terabytes of local storage.

256.0 GB of system memory providing 2.0 GB per core
7559 GB of local disk storage with Premium Storage capability

Suited for compute-intensive, network-bound, and database workloads
